title: Agent Engineering Bootcamp by Meri Nova and Hai Nghiem on Maven
text:
Founder, AI Educator to 145k Linkedin
Senior AI Engineer, Investor & Advisor
In just 5 weeks, you'll go from beginner to full-stack AI developer, mastering the latest AI coding tools and building most in-demand AI Engineering skills.
Trusted by 200+ engineers, PMs, designers, and founders building real agentic apps from zero experience.
How are we different?
...
1. Learn the tech stack that is actually used in the industry.
(Claude Code, Next.js, AI SDK, Python)
2. Build alongside senior full-stack AI engineer evert day. (Mon-Fri)
3. Get real-time feedback from our AI project grader.
(Improve consistently with feedback from instructors, TAs and our in-house AI helper)
🧠 Learn how to think like a real AI engineer, without spending 6 months learning by yourself.
Build production-grade agents that get you hired, funded, and leveled up. Join 200+ builders. Don’t just learn AI. Ship it.🚢
Learn each building block to build any agentic application. RAG, Tool Use, MCP, Agent Memory & Evals.
Learn how to use tools like Claude Code, Cursor and more to 10x your development workflows.
Learn our development methodology that helped 200+ students ship impressive AI products in 5 weeks.
Learn the architecture behind the most successful use cases from the industry, like Deep Research, Agentic Search, Coding Agents, and more!
Gain access to the high-agency AI engineers, industry experts and network that can change your career forever.
Developers and engineers ready to transition into high-paying AI engineering roles and stay competitive in the job market.
Senior leaders, executives, and PMs who need AI fluency to make smart decisions and effectively lead technical AI projects.
Entrepreneurs and founders ready to build successful AI products using the latest AI tools and proven frameworks from YCombinator startups.
Live sessions
Learn directly from Meri Nova & Hai Nghiem in a real-time, interactive format.
30 Live Coding Sessions
Watch a senior engineer build a project from scratch in front of your eyes.
16 Live Lectures
Attend high signal in-depth sessions on the latest Agentic Architectures and Protocols.
Lifetime access
Go back to course content and recordings even after graduation, whenever you need to.
Community of peers
Stay accountable and connect with high-agency and high-energy professionals.
Certificate of completion
Share your new skills with your employer or on LinkedIn.
API credits
Get a $2,000 worth of API credits from: Supabase, Tavily (web search), Vectorize (RAG), BrightData (web scraping), Factory (Coding Agents)!
Maven Guarantee
This course is backed by the Maven Guarantee. Students are eligible for a full refund through the second week of the course.
32 live sessions • 6 lessons • 2 projects

Discover how to design, develop, and launch full-stack agentic applications with production-ready workflows for LLMs.
Learn about the most popular frameworks, libraries, and platforms shaping full-stack agentic app development landscape.
Explore real-world obstacles teams face when creating agentic applications and hear practical strategies.
Live sessions
8-10 hrs / week
